_comment: Canonical test vectors for the SDK event-governance bloom filter. Pinned to prevent silent Py/JS hash drift. Values are unsigned 32-bit MurmurHash3 x86-32 outputs over the UTF-8 bytes of `input`. Both Python (the server-side platform, via mmh3) and TypeScript (the web SDK, via murmurhash3_x86_32) MUST agree on every row. See the SDK governance design doc §3.2.
